hero.title: Furniture That Outlasts You
hero.subtitle: Handcrafted from solid wood and steel. Built to last generations.

values.title: Why IntermosCraft
values.durabilityDesc: Built with materials and techniques that stand the test of time.
values.handcraftDesc: Every piece is made by hand with attention to the smallest detail.
values.personalizationDesc: Customize dimensions, materials, and finishes to your exact needs.
values.designDesc: Minimalist aesthetics where solid wood meets precision steel.

about.heroText: Where solid wood meets precision steel
about.story: IntermosCraft was born from a passion for creating furniture that bridges the warmth of natural wood with the strength of steel. Every piece we create is a testament to traditional craftsmanship enhanced by modern design principles.
about.storyMore: We believe furniture should be more than functional — it should be a statement piece that grows more beautiful with age. Our workshop in the Czech Republic is where raw materials are transformed into heirlooms.
about.step1Desc: Every piece begins with a conversation. We understand your space, your style, and your vision.
about.step2Desc: We hand-pick every plank of solid wood and cut every steel element to perfection.
about.step3Desc: Traditional woodworking meets modern metalwork in our workshop.
about.step4Desc: Your finished piece is carefully inspected and delivered to your home.
about.quality1Desc: Only premium hardwoods — oak, walnut, ash. No veneers, no particle board.
about.quality2Desc: Hand-welded steel frames finished with durable powder coating.
about.quality3Desc: Every joint, every edge, every surface is finished to perfection.
about.quality4Desc: Designed and handcrafted in our workshop with pride.

products.heroText: Three worlds. One workshop. Every piece tells a story of wood and steel.
products.hubLead: Seven lines, three distinct worlds — all designed, forged and finished in our workshop.
products.customNote: Every product can be customized. Contact us for bespoke dimensions and finishes.

poster.tagline: Wood and steel. Craftsmanship that outlives you.

furniture.name: Furniture & accessories
furniture.lead: Industrial pieces for everyday life at home.

exterior.name: Exterior
exterior.lead: Steel structures that transform the outdoor space.

custom.name: Custom orders
custom.lead: Original solutions to your exact needs. No compromises.

industrialFurniture.name: Industrial furniture
industrialFurniture.lead: Tables, side tables, shelves and other pieces that join solid wood with rugged steel. Designed for daily use — functional, stable and timeless.
industrialFurniture.tagline: Craft with weight, made to last.

industrialAccessories.name: Industrial accessories
industrialAccessories.lead: Practical and design-led details that complete the interior and exterior. Simple shapes, honest construction, an obsession with detail.

outdoorFire.name: Fire pits, hearths & grills
outdoorFire.lead: The centre of every outdoor space. Steel constructions built to endure daily use and the harshest conditions.

benches.name: Benches
benches.lead: Massive benches for indoor and outdoor. Stable construction, comfortable seating, and a design that holds its ground over time.

pergolasFences.name: Pergolas & fences
pergolasFences.lead: Structures that give a space order and character. Designed with focus on function, strength and a long life.

binBoxes.name: Bin enclosures
binBoxes.lead: A practical solution for everyday use. They hide what shouldn't be seen — and still belong to the space.

metalwork.name: Bespoke metalwork
metalwork.lead: Made to your needs from first sketch to final install. We work with steel, wood, and the combination of both. Every project is an original.

custom.intro: Have a specific piece in mind? Tell us about your dream furniture and we'll bring it to life.
custom.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us about the style, function, and any inspiration you have...
custom.successMessage: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 48 hours.
custom.configuratorSoon: Our interactive furniture configurator is coming soon. In the meantime, use the form above to describe your ideal piece.

contact.successMessage: Message sent! We'll respond within 24 hours.

footer.tagline: Handcrafted furniture from solid wood and steel.

nightstand.name: Nightstand
nightstand.description: Minimalist nightstand combining black steel with a solid oak shelf. The piece that outlasts you.

coffeeTable.name: Coffee Table
coffeeTable.description: Low-profile coffee table with a massive oak top and clean steel legs.

shelf.name: Wall Shelf
shelf.description: Floating wall shelf with steel brackets and oiled oak wood.

desk.name: Desk
desk.description: Spacious work desk with built-in cable management and solid wood top.

bench.name: Bench
bench.description: Entryway bench with steel frame and a warm oak seat.

tvStand.name: TV Stand
tvStand.description: Low media console with open shelving and hidden cable routing.

variants.fireTagline: Wood and steel. Craftsmanship that outlives you.
variants.fireSupporting: Outdoor living forged in matte steel, wood, and living flame.
variants.hearthSupporting: Workshop-born pieces for evenings that never end.
variants.materialOakDesc: Hand-selected premium hardwood. Every grain tells a story. No veneers, no particle board.
variants.materialSteelDesc: Hand-welded frames with durable powder coating. Every joint ground smooth — built to carry weight for generations.
variants.forgeOutdoorCaption: Matte steel, stacked wood, living flame — made to gather around.
